_doc: Ground truth for real-frame regression fixtures. All 8 are now hand-annotated: bg-00000 was hand-clicked at native resolution; bg-00001/02/05/06/07/08/09 were confirmed via the v0.7.1 model-prefill + snap-to-centroid annotation tool (prediction visually verified). Sources: 'hand' for confirmed; 'absent' for skipped (none currently).

bg-00001.png.note: Hand-confirmed via model-prefill annotate tool: v0.7.1 8e-3 ckpt prediction visually verified as on-cursor.
